description: The ProtoFluxReferenceProxy component is used to usually manage global references like on write node write targets and the monitoring slot on the slot events node.

fields.Node: The node this is making a visual for.
fields.ElementName: The element this is pointing to.
fields.ValueType: the type of the value input this is pointing to.
fields._label: The text element of the element this is for.
fields._proxyVisual: The button to set the input field value with.
fields._refProxySource: the component that handles grabbing the value of the field this points to via UIX.
fields.NodeReference: The node the value field points to, if it should point to a protoflux node like for a write node.
fields.Arrow: the arrow pointing to a protoflux node if the value field's value points to a protoflux node.
fields.ConnectPoint: The slot that should act as the connector point.
fields._currentName: The field to drive with the current name of the value that this component's value field is pointing to.
fields._selfHovering: The field to drive with whether or not this element is being hovered over.
fields._targetHovering: The field to drive with whether or not the element this is targeting is a node and is being hovered over.
fields._arrowManagerEnabled: The field to drive in order to enable/disable the arrow manager.
fields._arrowRendererEnabled: The field to drive in order to enable/disable the arrow manager's arrow visual.
